NR Test — Basic HTML

Home About Contact

About

This page exists to test that New Relic tracks navigation between pages on a static HTML site.

About this project

A minimal static HTML site with three pages, deployed on Azure Static Web Apps. Automatically redeployed on every push to the main branch via GitHub Actions.

Technology stack

Plain HTML + CSS — no JavaScript framework, no build step. New Relic is injected via the copy/paste script snippet in the <head> of every page.

© 2026 NR Test HTML — New Relic monitoring test site
